query:
SELECT 'beginner' as difficulty, COUNT(*) as count FROM quickfireQuestions WHERE echoCategory = 'fetal' AND difficulty = 'beginner'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'intermediate', COUNT(*) FROM quickfireQuestions WHERE echoCategory = 'fetal' AND difficulty = 'intermediate'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'advanced', COUNT(*) FROM quickfireQuestions WHERE echoCategory = 'fetal' AND difficulty = 'advanced'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'TOTAL', COUNT(*) FROM quickfireQuestions WHERE echoCategory = 'fetal';
